_README: Per-project progress state. Fetch this FIRST before any work on the project; the assistant outputs an updated copy at every step boundary and the USER pushes it. Never trust the chat scroll — trust this file plus the DB.
notes: STATE INITIALIZED 2026-07-13: no state.json had ever been pushed for this project (facts.json + article-list.json existed; progress was untracked). Site confirmed LIVE + registered in GSC by the user; canonical is https://www.romeforamericans.com (www). 96 articles published on the v1 engine. NOT yet in common.sites. Old engine has no fact-spans, no feature blocks, no standard feature set, no DESIGN-NOTES.md. Old identity 'Travertine & Imperial' (Cormorant Garamond + cream + oxblood, Cosmati inlay) — NOTE: v2 skeleton-check tripwires cosmati/travertine tokens; identity vocabulary must be rebuilt even though the soul is kept.

replatform.goal: Re-platform romeforamericans onto the v2 engine (Thailand-standard structure) with a design LEVEL-UP: keep the site's own identity/soul, raise execution ABOVE Thailand's bar. Content stays as written except the fact-DB retrofit + FAQ blocks (user-approved addition). Site is LIVE — all slugs/URLs preserved (route parity verified: /, /article/[slug], /category/[slug], /about, /disclosures, /search identical on v2; new routes additive → zero redirects). Category slugs kept (user decision). Then onboard into common.sites (NOT yet registered).

keys_proposed_pending_approval: eu.etias_required (new SHARED eu fact — gated block in rome-facts.sql)
part1_fact_retrofit.verification: DOM-only (cheerio); 34/34 counts exact; strip-spans wording diff = byte-identical text on all 96 articles; no nested/empty spans. BIT fare re-verified €1.50 on ATAC 2026-07-13 (increase to €2.00 approved-pending — high-priority check config); Colosseum 24h validity re-verified on colosseo.it 2026-07-13.
known_flags: rome-in-3-days advisory instance left as prose: comma sits INSIDE the quotes ('caution,"') — spanning would break punctuation on substitution. Optional 1-char punctuation move needs approval.
what-to-pack 'six months beyond your trip' left as prose: it is advice framing; facts.json passport_validity_required = 3 months (6 recommended) — spanning would contradict wording.
apply_steps: 1. Run rome-facts.sql in Supabase SQL editor (service role) — BEFORE the article update, so spans never render on fallback. Decide the gated eu.etias_required block while there.
2. node scripts/articles-batch.mjs update retrofit-update.json  (from rome repo root; 13 articles; status preserved, no --set-status)

3. Spot-check a live article (view-source /article/rome-airport-to-city-center) — v1 engine will NOT resolve spans (no lib/facts.ts) — they render as their fallback text, invisible to readers; resolution begins when v2 ships. This is fail-closed and safe to apply now.
4. OPTIONAL: enable the two ready check configs (advisory_level, bit_fare) after confirming the select regex against page source.
5. Push to travel-facts/romeforamericans/: rome-facts.sql, updated facts.json (6 additive keys), and this state.json.

part3_design_levelup.note: Old identity vocabulary (cosmati/travertine classes) is tripwired in v2 skeleton-check — rebuild vocabulary, keep soul. 2–3 directions on the real rendered site, screenshot self-critique loop, human gate before mass-apply.

part4_feature_set.note: User approved adding FAQ blocks (assistant decides count/coverage) — the ONE sanctioned content addition beyond fact-spans.

part5_fleet_onboarding.note: insert into common.sites + expose 'rome' schema in Data API + sequence grant + /go/ click-logging snippet.
